name: Instant Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a single chocolate digestive biscuit at the bottom of a serving dish.
2. Spread an even layer of Philadelphia cream cheese over the biscuit, covering it completely.
3. Halve a strawberry and place on top of the cream cheese.
4. Gently press down to secure the strawberry halves in place.
Note: The original recipe text was minimal and did not include detailed instructions or quantities for each ingredient, so I have added logical steps based on typical cheesecake preparation while keeping the core concept intact.
